transcript.content: 继续之后，第 3 个点也已经基本收住了。 现在状态是：
直接给你一条最短回归命令，方便你以后自己 spot check。
最短 spot check 我建议就这 2 条： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ```
接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

The active thread then moved to expanding harder regression cases, especially natural Chinese multi-turn topic switching.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is still on the same active topic as t10-t11: expanding harder cases while avoiding whitelist-like or hardcoded behavior, so relation=continue. The next turn mainly depends on the immediate regression-case discussion, especially t10 and t11, which should remain raw. Older turns t1-t9 describe already-resolved status, commands, and prior completed fixes, so they are good eviction candidates. I pinned t6 as a durable preference for repeatable in-repo smoke/eval coverage, t10 as the broader goal to keep harder Chinese multitopic return cases in fixed regression, and t12 as the key user constraint to avoid whitelist/hardcoded solutions.
